title: dioscorea × hybrida
intro: Dioscorea × hybrida, also known as the yam or Chinese yam, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Dioscorea opposita and Dioscorea polystachya, two species of yam native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to improve immune function and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Dioscorea × hybrida include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Dioscorea × hybrida is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and is prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and extracts for its medicinal purposes.
